added.description: Stan and Francine inject some much-needed fire into their relationship.

input: A Song of Knives and Fire

added.title: A Song of Knives and Fire

added.description: Francine is jealous of the new and improved Klaus and vows to take him down.

added.description: Bob tells Linda and the kids the story behind an old, broken radio.
added.title: Radio No You Didn't

added.description: Twinkie the Kid dispenses justice-and lead!  Popular board games from Chutes and Ladders to Hungry Hungry Hippos get turned into action-packed feature films.  Meet Skeletor's dentist, Mo-Larr!

Robot Chicken whores itself out to corporate America.  Snow Job finds his specialized skills aren't in high demand with G.I. Joe.  Thing grows up and leaves the Adams Family nest.  The Memory Game challenges the brainpower of contestants, and the penalty for failure is death!  The Black Stallion teaches us about race relations.  Oprah and Dr. Phil team up in the greatest buddy cop movie ever!
added.title: A Day at the Circus
tags: robot chicken episode 37 day at the circus snow job gi joe thing adams family black stallion oprah dr phil

added.description: The Fantanas visit the Middle East peace process.  E.T. finally returns home, but it's less cool than he remembered.
added.title: Adoption's An Option
tags: robot chicken episode 36 adoption's an option fantanas et pumpkins jack o lanterns pegasus skynet inspector gadget

added.description: Mr. T and the Foo Fighters forge an unlikely alliance.  Stretch Armstrong needs a corn syrup transplant.  A mermaid shows a surface boy the wonders of Atlantis.  A guy dates his GPS navigational system.  Learn the untold origin of Alvin and the Chipmunks! Roger Ebert and guest reviewer M. Night Shyamalan present upcoming feature films, including Schindler's List 2: Schindler's Pissed.
added.title: Anne Marie's Pride
tags: robot chicken episode 39 anne marie's pride mr. t foo fighters stretch armstrong mermaid gps alvin chipmunks m night shyamalan

added.description: Vince Vaughn presents his new hit show, Vince Vaughn Bangs Your Mom.  Meet Casper's brother Jasper, the Douchebag Ghost.  Ninjas compete in a game show.  A nerd gives us a much-needed lesson on GoBots.  The cast of Sesame Street deals with a viral outbreak.  A robot learns what it means to be alive.  Robot Chicken holds a telethon that goes horribly awry.
added.title: Book of Corrine
tags: robot chicken episode 40 book of corrinne vince vaughn bangs mom casper jasper ninjas sesame street outbreak

added.description: Mexico builds its greatest hero in The Six Million Peso Man.  That old dancing guy from the Six Flags commercials saves-and ruins-the day.  Two aliens from Space Invaders revolt.  A cleaning woman finds the Batcave the hard way.  Lindsay Lohan enters the world of Highlander and battles teen starlet foes.
added.title: Celebrity Rocket
tags: robot chicken rc celebrity rocket episode 24

added.description: Learn the secret life of Pokemon's Pikachu!  Stupid kids get a new high from "numb-chucking."  A checkers champion goes on the adventure of a lifetime.  Meet Eagle Eye Smith, the blind athlete who will touch your heart.  Then meet the Four My Little Ponys of the Apocalypse.  A kid gets a used-car surprise: a Tron cycle!  The Golden Girls share their sexual escapades a la Sex and the City.
added.title: Cracked China

added.description: People of all ages love the new toy, Morning Wood! A man's groin is possessed in Idle Nuts. Live in fear when a giant midget attacks! A cleaning woman finds the Batcave the hard way. Atreyu and Falcor kick off a Neverending Party! An evening news broadcast spins out of control.
added.title: Dragon Nuts

added.description: Learn the secret life of Batman villain the Penguin.  Kids will love playing with My Stalker! Orlando Bloom must help his fellow passengers survive after a plane crash. Meet Cork, the world's greatest retarded detective! Jesus and the Argonauts find action and adventure, and turn their backs on it. The Micronauts climb a mountain.  The U.S. government declares war on Christmas.
added.title: Drippy Pony
tags: robot chicken episode 34 drippy pony march penguin batman stalker Orlando bloomin onion Jesus argonauts micronauts

added.description: Fred and Barney brawl over a box of Fruity Pebbles. Kids have fun with the Phyllis Diller Spray-n-Play. An Egyptian pharaoh builds a pyramid of Legos.
added.title: Easter Basket
tags: robot chicken rc easter basket episode 22

added.description: A time-traveling jerk wreaks havoc on history.  Lion-O, leader of the ThunderCats, suffers as an Earth pet.  Clifford the Big Red Dog gets in big, red trouble.  Evel Knievel wows his nursing home.
added.title: Federated Resources

added.description: Young Victor Frankenstein attempts to bring his cat back to life.  The I Think We Should Just be Friends Fairy ruins a guy's life.  Cameron Diaz has just 24 hours to live!  Calvin and Hobbes have fun therapy adventures.  A game of Marco Polo gets out of hand.  Mario and Luigi stumble into the violent world of Grand Theft City.
added.title: Lust for Puppets
tags: robot chicken episode 38 lust for puppets frankenstein friends fairy cameon diaz calvin and hobbes grand theft auto mario

added.description: The Senior Mutant Ninja Turtles rock the nursing home!  Cuddles the fabric softener bear gets the wrong kind of hug.  Monkeys explore outer space on a budget.  George W. Bush discovers he has Jedi powers.  And we're back with more of those stupendous bloopers, including audition tapes from MTV's Jackass!
added.title: Massage Chair

added.description: Young Young Indiana Jones finds treasure at his elementary school.  Rainbow Brite reveals her dark side.  Montezuma gets his revenge, and the results smell terrible.  Malibu Barbie learns why you don't build your Dream House in Malibu.  Rom: Spaceknight meets his ultimate nemesis!  Into the Blue gets a relevant skewering.  Hulk Hogan busts out of prison camp in Hogan's Heroes.
added.title: Metal Militia
tags: robot chicken metal militia rc episode 31

added.description: Care Bears care a lot-about ethnic cleansing.  See the action-packed story of Heimlich and his quest to unblock your windpipe.  Rick Schroeder is fighting crime in style in the new hit series Rick Shaw.  Ben Affleck sues the AFLAC duck.  Corporate disputes get solved hand-to-hand in Office Fighter.  Harry Potter uses magic to fight... puberty!
added.title: Password: Swordfish
tags: robot chicken rc password swordfish episode 29

added.description: Southern-fried funerals get exciting thanks to Dixie Joe! The Booger Man makes a mess.  Frankenstein's in-laws are less than pleased.  Order your movie tickets from Fan-Dingo--the paper bags want you to.  The cast of Final Fantasy VII get jobs at a burger chain.  A young soccer player named Ricky faces life's obstacles.   Bugs Bunny goes hip-hop in 8 Carrot.
added.title: Rodiggity

added.description: Lil' Hitler will win your heart! The Library of Heaven yields answers even God doesn't want you to know.  The Burger King serves up some delicious B&E. Garfield and Heathcliff take each other to court. A giraffe deals with the stages of death. Action Jackson endorses laundry detergent.  Never pick up a hitchhiking pig! The gang from Police Academy joins the X-Men.
added.title: Sausage Fest
tags: robot chicken episode 33 sausage fest lil hitler library heaven poop garfield heathcliff giraffe grief x-men police academy

added.description: Robot Chicken gets un-canceled! Learn tips for fighting... terrorism! Mexico builds its greatest hero in The Six Million Peso Man. Skater McGee is a re-animated corpse, an extreme re-animated corpse!
added.title: Suck It
tags: robot chicken rc suck it episode 21

added.description: The legendary Kraken sea monster learns freedom isn't all it's krak-ed up to be.  A kid has a fantastic dream about a bear.  Weird Al Yankovic's "Weasel Stomping Day" gets a Robot Chicken video treatment!  Playmobil cowboys search for new frontiers.  A day at the ballpark proves why radio sucks.  The wishes of children come true, with dire results.  The crew of the Starship Enterprise faces their greatest foes yet-themselves!
added.title: The Munnery
tags: robot chicken episode 35 the munnery kraken weird al yankovic weasel stomping day playmobil cowboys playboy radio star trek

added.description: The classic movie Beastmaster takes Broadway by storm.  Mrs. McNally's third-graders present: Tim Burton's The Corpse Bride.
added.title: Veggies For Sloth

added.description: The tale of Rick Grimes and his walker-battling friends gets a twisted retelling when the Robot Chicken Nerd visits the Walking Dead Museum and meets an aging survivor.

input: Walking Dead Special: Look Who's Walking

added.title: Walking Dead Special: Look Who's Walking

added.description: Tom attempts a Puddins fast after his son dies from a pudding overdose.
added.title: Puddins
tags: tom goes to the mayor episode 29 puddins pudding overdose son death

removed.description: Bob and Linda try to attend all three kids' holiday performances at the same time.
removed.title: The Plight Before Christmas

removed.description: Camp Bucktooth and Buster & TJ are two made-in-Atlanta cartoons, one set in a dysfunctional summer camp, the other following two blobs who always ruin the whole day for everyone.
removed.title: Camp Bucktooth/Buster & TJ

removed.description: The Mayor helps Tom become head coach of Jefferton's Boy's Wrestling Team.
removed.title: Wrestling
tags: tom goes to the mayor episode 16 wrestling team

removed.description: A new friendship causes Hayley to start worrying she might be slowly turning into Francine. Steve and his friends try out for Roger's improv troupe.
removed.title: The Sinister Fate!!

removed.description: Hayley and Jeff help one of Roger's personas run a solar company.
removed.title: Dr. Sunderson's SunSuckers
